name: Squaw Bread-- Bmm
recipeIngredient: 5/8 cup Water (for Welbilt/Dak machines add 2 tbsp more water)
2 tsp Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, liquefy the milk, water, oil, honey, raisins, and brown sugar on high speed.
2. Combine the blended mixture with the rest of the ingredients in a bread pan.
3. Select the Light Crust setting and press Start.
4. After the baking cycle ends, remove the bread from the pan and place it on a cake rack.
5. Allow the bread to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
